query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `groups`) as total_groups,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workers) as total_workers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_events) as total_attendance,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batches) as total_payroll_batches,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cost_centers) as total_cost_centers;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `groups`) as total_groups,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workers) as total_workers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_events) as total_attendance,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batches) as total_payroll_batches,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cost_centers) as total_cost_centers;
